name: STM32H523 UFQFPN48
description: Generated from the STM32H523 alternate-function workbook and STM32H523CC datasheet for STM32H523 UFQFPN48. This definition models the UFQFPN48 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32H523 devices expand the entry H5 line with larger package options, richer timers, OCTOSPI, FMC, and wider connectivity routing. This package definition exposes 42 peripheral blocks covering 8 timers, 2 low-power timers, 7 serial ports, 4 SPI controllers, 3 I2S interfaces, 3 I2C controllers, 1 SDMMC host interface, 2 FDCAN controllers, 2 ADC instances, a dual-channel DAC, a digital camera interface, 1 USB Type-C / Power Delivery controller, and 1 USB interface.
